settings.heading: Rulz Academy
settings.subheading: Junior coaching sessions every Monday. Develop skills in a fun cage environment.

settings.label: JUNIOR DEVELOPMENT
settings.heading: Train Like a Pro
settings.content:
Rulz Academy is our junior football development program for ages 6-14. Every Monday from 4:00 PM to 5:30 PM, our qualified coaches run structured sessions focused on ball control, passing, shooting, and game awareness — all inside our premium cage courts.

$15 per session. No long-term commitment required. Just rock up and play.

settings.heading: Enrol Your Child
settings.subheading: Contact us to register for the next Academy session.
